ops.title: Workflow agents with big free-text StructuredOutput fields hit JSON-parse retry death; cap field sizes and recover reports from the transcript
ops.body:
A Workflow `agent({schema})` whose result carries long free-text fields (~2KB+ summaries) can fail `StructuredOutput` JSON parsing repeatedly (escaping/truncation) and burn the 5-retry cap — the workflow dies with "retry cap exceeded" even though the agent's actual work succeeded.

**Why:** the payload, not the work, is the failure; the verify agent in the cc-notes flag-cutover run (2026-07-08) passed 26/26 checks but killed the workflow trying to report them.

**How to apply:** in RESULT schemas, describe fields with explicit caps ("KEEP UNDER 700 CHARACTERS"); push long detail into a scratchpad file the agent writes, returning only the path. When a workflow dies this way, the work is usually intact — read `<transcriptDir>/journal.jsonl` and the agent's `agent-*.jsonl` tail to recover the report instead of re-running. Related: [[teammates-idle-without-delivering]].
